business_description.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania

coverages_discussed.coverage_type: Workers Compensation (inferred from policy number prefix WC)

positives: 42 years in business with 28 years under current management
Formal written safety program in place
Maintains OSHA 300 logs and conducts regular job-site safety audits
Hold-harmless agreements obtained from all subcontractors
concerns: No written contracts with all subcontractors
Certificates of insurance are NOT required from all subcontractors before work begins
40% of work is performed by subcontractors
Hazardous materials used or encountered in operations
Elevated claim count in prior years (13 claims in 2024, 10 in 2023)
Prior carrier cancellation in 2022 (Zurich Insurance Group)
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 2024: Nationwide Insurance, premium $1,634,721.63, 13 claims, no cancellation. 2023: Berkshire Hathaway Guard, premium $1,476,849.96, 10 claims, no cancellation. 2022: Zurich Insurance Group, premium $1,369,245.71, 4 claims, cancelled.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania. 425 full-time and 45 part-time employees. Annual revenue of $95,000,000. Hours of operation: Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 3:30 PM. 40% of work performed by subcontractors vs. own employees. Three largest projects completed in past 3 years: 1) $1.2M restaurant build-out, 2) $800K medical office renovation, 3) $650K church addition. Operations performed above 4 stories.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program: Yes. Formal written safety program: Yes. Formal return-to-work or modified duty program: Yes. Maintains OSHA 300 logs and conducts regular job-site safety audits: Yes. Hold-harmless agreements obtained from all subcontractors: Yes. Written contracts with all subcontractors: No. Certificates of insurance required from all subcontractors before work begins: No.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history shows 13 claims in 2024 (Nationwide, $1,634,721.63 premium), 10 claims in 2023 (Berkshire Hathaway Guard, $1,476,849.96 premium), and 4 claims in 2022 (Zurich Insurance Group, $1,369,245.71 premium, policy cancelled).
